title: Indian Market Update on Mar 17th 2026
description:
**Sector Shift: Why IT is Struggling and Quick Commerce is Booming Amid Global Oil Shocks**

*   **The Oil Shock Effect:** Brent crude has crossed $100 a barrel due to Middle East tensions, pushing the Indian Rupee to an all-time low of 92.40 against the US Dollar. This caused foreign investors to pull out over ₹25,000 crore in March, though regular SIPs from Indian investors helped balance the market.
*   **Massive Market Downgrade:** Because high oil prices make transportation and manufacturin

title: Crafting an Outlier Career | Arnav Gupta On Designing IPL's Tech, Zomato CEO Deepinder Goyal, Rejecting Facebook Offer at 22
description:
This episode of The Inner Scorecard features Arnav Gupta , an engineering leader at Meta who has built a career defined by high agency and outlier decisions. We go back to the university days, and everyone knew Arnav as one of the best coders, but nobody could've guessed he would go on to solve some of the hardest tech problems out there.


From rejecting Facebook and Zomato straight out of college to start Coding Blocks, to advising Deepinder Goyal at 25, and eventually scaling the IPL live str

title: Decoding Zomato and Swiggy delivery partners earnings, why more ad dollars are flowing to chatbots and more | MC Tech3
description: On this episode of Tech 3 Podcast, we break down earnings of delivery partners at platforms such as Zomato and Swiggy, discuss why more ad dollars are flowing to AI chatbots like Gemini, ChatGPT, Perplexity, list the key asks of space tech startups ahead of the Union Budget and tell you why Q3 is going to be a muted quarter for Indian IT firms. title: Ep51:印度外卖大战内幕，Swiggy如何逆袭Zomato？
description:
本期节目，我们继续蓝海前哨系列，解码新兴市场的创变者，一起看看印度充满活力的外卖市场，重点分析两大巨头 Swiggy 和 Zomato 之间的激烈竞争，以及 Swiggy 在 Zomato 上市导致其被超越后，如何通过一系列创新策略成功逆袭并改善盈利状况的。
总结来看，Swiggy 的逆袭之路就像一个瑞士军刀。当主要的刀片（传统外卖业务）开始变钝时，他们没有只顾着磨刀，而是果断地打开了其他工具（会员、学生计划、企业服务），同时还利用了内置的放大镜（Instamart）来精准定位并免费吸引新用户，最终形成了一套攻守兼备、能适应复杂环境的工具组合。
在印度这样的复杂市场中，成功需要持续的创新、对本土市场的深度理解和灵活的商业模式。对于想要进入或关注印度市场的公司而言，避免简单复制粘贴、保持战略定力与快速适应性、以及清晰衡量多业务平台间的协同效应至关重要。
00:24 竞争背景与战略重心转变
02:31 进攻策略：拓展场景与用户基础
09:42防守策略：提高盈利能力
14:16 成本优化与业务协同效应
19:03 总结与启示
**制作团队**
Tony Li，硬科技与医疗赛道15年持续捕手

title: SPOS #836 - Ashish Goel On Overcoming The Challenges Of Creative Work
description:
Welcome to episode #836 of Six Pixels of Separation.
 Here it is: Six Pixels of Separation - Episode #836 - Host: Mitch Joel. Ashish Goel has launched and run design divisions for multiple international companies. He is an entrepreneur, designer, former teaching fellow and a collaborator on the Stanford 2025 project. He is the former head of design at Zomato (India's larger-scale Yelp!). title: Why you have to pay attention to the public markets this week
description:
Hello and welcome back to Equity, a podcast about the business of startups, where we unpack the numbers and nuance behind the headlines.
Alex and Grace are back to cover the biggest and most interesting technology, startup and markets news. Sitting as we are on the precipice of a huge data dump, we had lots to chat through!

Stocks are mixed around the world, while crypto selloff modestly after some recovery gains. In general, the value of securities are down in recent weeks and months, and now,
